name: testimonial
description: Trust-first review ad: Hook → Story (how they found it) → Result (specific outcomes) → CTA. ~28s.

beats.title: Hook
beats.goal: Open with the strongest specific result or a contrarian opinion about the category

beats.title: Story
beats.goal: Quick personal backstory: skepticism → trying the product; product appears naturally

beats.title: Result
beats.goal: Two or three concrete outcomes stated like a friend would, product in hand

beats.title: Call To Action
beats.goal: Soft-sell recommendation plus where to get it
